headline: CNBC Daily Open: Trump goes from opening the Strait of Hormuz to blockading it
summary: The failed peace talks left investors on edge with little visibility on how the blockade will be implemented, and how long and deep an oil shock needs to be priced in.

raw.headline: CNBC Daily Open: Trump goes from opening the Strait of Hormuz to blockading it
raw.summary: The failed peace talks left investors on edge with little visibility on how the blockade will be implemented, and how long and deep an oil shock needs to be priced in.

headline: Oil Surges 7% on Hormuz Blockade, U.S. Gulf Tanker Rush — 3 Stocks to Buy Now
summary: Oil prices are jumping 7% as President Trump orders a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, tightening global supply. At the same time, empty tankers originally bound for the Middle East have rerouted to U.S. Gulf Coast ports, snapping up domestic crude and giving American producers an extra lift. headline: Saudi Arabia's East-West Pipeline Back at Full Steam After Iran Disruptions
summary: Saudi Arabia announced on Sunday that its East-West pipeline has been fully restored to its peak throughput of roughly 7 million barrels daily, following damage inflicted on its energy infrastructure during the ongoing conflict with Iran.
